description_long: This object depicts a distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated and twisted limbs, giving it an abstract and surreal appearance. The figure appears to be wearing a long skirt or dress and a fitted top, with the lower body and legs unnaturally stretched and bent. The head and upper torso are more recognizable, with visible facial features and long hair cascading down. The arms are also elongated and merge into the surrounding structure, making it difficult to distinguish clear boundaries. The overall form is highly deformed, with parts of the body blending into each other and the environment. The surface has a smooth, slightly glossy finish, and the colors are muted earth tones.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs, wearing a long skirt and fitted top, and featuring long hair. The form is abstract, with smooth surfaces and muted earth tones.
description_view_0: The figure's upper body and head are most visible, with the long skirt and twisted legs extending downward and to the side.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the elongated lower body and the merging of limbs into the surrounding structure.
description_view_2: The back of the head and upper torso are visible, with the skirt and legs appearing even more abstract and twisted.
description_view_3: The figure's lower body and legs dominate the view, showing the extreme distortion and blending of limbs.
attribute_posture: standing with limbs unnaturally elongated and twisted
